DBA DOMINICAN HOSPITAL

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH, INC.'S MOTION TO DEEM THE TRUTH OF THE MATTERS SPECIFIED IN THE REQUEST FOR ADMISSION, SET TWO, ADMITTED; TO COMPEL VERIFIED RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET TWO, WITHOUT OBJECTION; AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED. THE MOTION IS UNOPPOSED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE TIMELY RESPONSES TO DIGNITY HEALTH'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, SET TWO AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION SET TWO. PURSUANT TO CCP 2033.280(C), DIGNITY HEALTH'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, SET TWO ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. WITHIN 10 DAYS, PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO DIGNITY HEALTH'S REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION, SET TWO. (CCP 2031.300(B).) MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED TO DIGNITY HEALTH AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 1,060.00 TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185.

Ntc Of Mtn To Deem The Truth Of The Matters Specified In The Request For Admission, Set Two, Admitted; To Compel Verified Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two, Without Objection; And Request For Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jul-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: ATTY SANDRA K. McINTYRE, LEWIS BRISBOIS, 415.438.5917, APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH;
NO APPEARANCE BY ANY OTHER PARTY OR COUNSEL.

DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH, INC.'S MOTION To Deem The Truth Of The Matters Specified In The Request For Admission, Set Two, Admitted; To Compel Verified Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two, Without Objection; And Request For Attorneys' Fees And Costs is Granted. The motion is unopposed. Plaintiff failed to provide timely responses to Dignity Health's Requests For Admission, Set Two and Requests for Production Set Two. Pursuant to CCP 2033.280(c), Dignity Health's Requests For Admission, Set Two are deemed admitted. Within 10 days, Plaintiff shall provide verified responses, without objection, to Dignity Health's Requests for Production, Set Two. (CCP 2031.300(b).) Monetary sanctions are awarded to Dignity Health and against Plaintiff in the amount of $ 1,060.00 to be paid within 30 days. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185.
